title: selaginella rupestris var. sibirica
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. sibirica, also known as Siberian spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its tiny, scale-like leaves. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with potential health benefits including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of respiratory issues, and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a powder or infusion, and it is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Siberian spikemoss for medicinal purposes.
